description_long: This object consists of a group of various road traffic signs, each mounted on a slender metallic post. The signs include a mix of circular, triangular, and rectangular shapes, featuring a range of colors such as blue, red, and white, with some containing pictograms and others with text. The collection includes regulatory, warning, and informational signs, such as turn directions, prohibitions, pedestrian crossings, and electrical hazard warnings. The posts are uniformly spaced and appear to be made of metal, supporting the signs at a height suitable for visibility to drivers and pedestrians. The signs are designed to be highly visible and durable, with reflective surfaces for nighttime visibility. This set would typically be found in an urban environment, such as along streets, intersections, or near pedestrian crossings.
description: A group of metal post-mounted traffic signs in various shapes and colors, featuring regulatory, warning, and informational symbols and text. The signs are arranged in rows and are designed for urban roadside use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, clearly displaying their symbols, colors, and text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profiles of the signs and the alignment of the posts, with minimal visibility of the sign faces.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs, which are plain and metallic, with no visible symbols or text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin edges of the signs and the arrangement of the posts.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Arrow symbols, pedestrian crossing, electrical hazard, turn prohibitions, and other standard traffic pictograms.
